listSearch: SELECT id, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM flux WHERE active = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1)) ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?2 OFFSET ?3
listAll: SELECT id, name, description, created_at, updated_at FROM flux WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT ?1 OFFSET ?2
countSearch: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM flux WHERE active = 1 AND (LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER(?1) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(?1))
countAll: SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM flux WHERE active = 1
insert: INSERT INTO flux (id, name, description) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3)
insertStep: INSERT INTO flux_steps (id, id_fluxo, id_order, name) VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4)
deactivate: UPDATE flux SET active = 0 WHERE id = ?1
getById: SELECT * FROM flux WHERE id = ?1 AND active = 1
listSteps: SELECT id, id_order, name FROM flux_steps WHERE id_fluxo = ?1 ORDER BY id_order ASC
update: UPDATE flux SET name = ?1, description = ?2, updated_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?3
